name: Spinach Mushroom Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend tofu in a food processor.
2. Add salt, lemon juice, vegetable oil, tahini, and miso to the blended tofu. Blend until thoroughly smooth. Set aside.
3. Heat olive oil in a large skillet. Add onion and sauté until translucent.
4. Add garlic, pepper, nutmeg, tarragon, dill, and mushrooms. Sauté for several minutes.
5. Stir in chopped spinach and parsley. Sauté briefly to retain color.
6. Remove from heat. Mix the sautéed vegetables with the tofu mixture.
7. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Lightly oil the bottom and sides of a baking dish.
9. Sprinkle 2-3 tablespoons breadcrumbs evenly over the bottom of the dish.
10. Sprinkle 1/3 of the walnuts on top, followed by 1/4 of the tomato sauce.
11. Lay 3 lasagna noodles on top of the sauce and spread half the tofu mixture evenly over the noodles.
12. Repeat with a second layer: more noodles, sauce, and remaining tofu mixture.
13. Sprinkle the rest of the breadcrumbs and walnuts over the top.
14. Cover the dish and bake for 30 minutes.
15. Uncover and bake an additional 10 minutes.
16. Let cool for 20 to 30 minutes before slicing.
